title: Indian-Style Lentil Scramble
description: A vegetarian twist on traditional scrambled eggs, made with red lentils and Indian spices.
instructions: Rinse the lentils and soak them in water for 30 minutes. Drain and set aside.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
Add the garam masala, turmeric, and salt. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the soaked lentils and 2 cups of water to the pan. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
In a separate pan, scramble the eggs (or egg substitute).
Once the lentils are cooked, mash them with a fork to create a scrambled egg-like texture.
Combine the cooked lentils and scrambled eggs in the pan. Stir well.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
